### **Document Analysis & Professional Summary**

**Title:** Mechanisms of Facial Aging and Anti-Aging Interventions: SMAS Layer Analysis and Treatment Protocols
**Source Institution:** Hangzhou Dongfang Plastic Surgery Hospital (杭州東方整形醫院)
**Key Expert:** Huang Qingwu (黃慶武), MD, PhD (Tongji Medical University / American University of California)
**Core Procedure Highlighted:** "Mid-Facial Rejuvenation via Blepharoplasty Approach" (瞼袋入路中面部回春術) – Claimed as the first invention by the author.

#### **1. Clinical Symptoms & Pathophysiology of Facial Aging**
The document categorizes facial aging into specific anatomical and structural manifestations:
*   **Upper Face:** Brow ptosis (眉毛下垂) and lateral canthal ptosis/corner drooping (眼角下垂).
*   **Mid-to-Lower Face:**
    *   Deepening of nasolabial folds (法令紋加重).
    *   Deepening of marionette lines/corner-of-mouth wrinkles (嘴角紋加重).
    *   General sagging of the mid-to-lower facial skin.
*   **Underlying Mechanism:** The document identifies the relaxation/laxity of the **SMAS
